name: sat_AAGAG_chr2L
description: Drosophila simple satellite block: AAGAG satellite block on chr2L pericentric heterochromatin. 5-bp repeat, ~3 Mb array, the most abundant simple satellite in D. melanogaster.. Drosophila satellites are chromosome-position-specific and used as cytogenetic markers (Lohe 1993). They form most of the ~30% of the genome that is heterochromatin.
